title: Intensely Flavored Indian Chicken Butter Chicken
description: A low-carb friendly, quick-fix Indian dish featuring garlic granules and dashi-extract, with a fermented cheese-pull twist.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter to the skillet and stir in the garlic granules and dashi-extract.
Stir in the tomato puree, heavy cream, garam masala, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Stir in the shredded mozzarella cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked chicken back to the skillet and stir to coat with the cheese sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
